programme.title: Hydroplane Racing
programme.desc: Hydroplane Racing

programme.title: Air Battles
programme.desc: Air Battles

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Last Command
programme.desc: In this fact-based film legendary Texan Jim Bowie Sterling Hayden attempts to come to a nonviolent compromise with Mexican President Santa Anna J Carrol Naish but the negotiations soon turn sour Consuelo de Quesada Anna Maria Alberghetti a Mexican girl with close ties to Jim then warns him that Santa Anas men are planning to invade So Jim Davy Crockett Arthur Hunnicutt and a tiny crew of courageous Texans hide out in an abandoned mission awaiting the violent confrontation

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: Wacky hijinks of counselors and campers at a less-than-average summer camp

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hooded Horsemen
programme.desc: In a small frontier mining town a gang of outlaws in black hoods is running roughshod over locals presiding over a reign of terror Tex Tex Ritter and Stubby Horace Murphy take up the dying wish of Tom Lafe McKee a kindly rancher killed by the gang to capture the marauders Knowing that the survival of the local mine and the heart of Toms sweet daughter Iris Meredith are on the line Tex and Stubby go undercover in the gang hoping to bring them down from the inside

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Lana Simon and Duke go to the Mirror World to rescue the princess father King Charles In the mean time their opposites are on a journey to their world

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget protects a man who knows too much

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: The Great Grape Ape

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: Hair Bear Bunch

programme.title: Hong 109
programme.desc: Hong 109

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Vietnam Nurses
programme.desc: Vietnam Nurses is a 2005 television documentary directed by Polly Watkins It tells the story of six Australian Army nurses who served in a field hospital in Vietnam between the years 1962 and 1972

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 2
programme.desc: Part 2 The Undeclared War

programme.title: Operation Valkyrie - The Plot To Kill Hitler
programme.desc: Operation Valkyrie The Plot To Kill Hitler is the definitive film on Claus Schenk Graf von Stauffenberg and the ‘Valkyrie’ conspiracy to assassinate Hitler on 20th July 1944 Produced in collaboration with the official German Foundation dedicated to the memory of the conspirators it features testimonials and eyewitness accounts from all of the aristocratic families involved in the plot including the last living conspirator to escape Hitler’s wrath and Maria Countess von Stauffenberg who knew Claus all her life

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A fashion designer demands too much from his model which leads to her suicide This gets all those hed wronged to seek revenge

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick tries to stop drinking blood but falls off the wagon and must fight his urges to go on a murderous spree

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler discovers a way to increase his winnings but the method proves to be deadly

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A couple move into an old house that is supposedly haunted but the wife soon realizes just whos haunting the house Later another couple move into the house and form an unusual relationship with the moving man

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: In Los Angeles aspiring screenwriter Edward Foster from Indiana has a crush on his neighbor Miranda Singer However bimbo Miranda is a gold digger who does not give Edward any attention His unrequited love is noticed by his creepy landlord Mr Stronham who offers Edward a love potion in order to seduce Miranda Will the potion work

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A sadistic serial killer has unforeseen complications when pursued by a determined motorcycle cop in a barren desert

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL must track down the secret journal of a retired secret agent

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Captain Grant and Trans Cal Truckings new strongman Cooley conspire to put Bear Enterprises out of business aided and abetted by a stranger with a secret

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger invests in Lady Linda a lovesick racehorse that wont run so its Mister Ed the love doctor to the rescue

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: George Burns is offering 25000 for a great new novelty act so Wilbur begs Mister Ed to talk to Mr Burns

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for 1000000 in diamonds but can he be trusted

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Efforts to aid a Nazi generals assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Fed up with a lack of respect from The Crew and low on self-esteem Parker puts in for a transfer But complications develop when McHale and The Boys work up a scheme to try to make him change his mind

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A new Navy Directive - Which states that all overweight Combat Officers are to be shipped out - Prompts Binghamton to see that McHale puts on an extra 6 pounds - Enough to put him over the limit

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Duke talks Gomer into taking a jeep to the airport

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer is a look-out for burglars robbing the base

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professors data indicates that the island is sinking but the men dont want to break the news to the women who have the men in the middle of a landscaping project The Professor ends up hurting his back helping with a rock garden

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find two crates of silent film equipment in a sunken boat in the lagoon The Professor then comes up with the idea to make a film telling their story send it out on a raft and hope for rescue

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa solicits George MacMichaels help in turning the tables on two swindlers who convinced him to pay 35 for a worthless dog but he begins to have a change of heart when he discovers that Little Luke has become quite attached to the animal

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The rest of the McCoys find themselves torn over what to do about musically-challenged Lukes determination to enter an amateur singing contest

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Smart is hypnotized to kill the Chief during their nightly game of chess

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: The Amazing Alonzo performs illusions for his fans while neglecting gal pal Ramona Dr Diller and his wife dont know that their son Bobby lies to get attention Julies friend Karen has facial scars after an accident and is insecure

programme.title: WKRP 216
programme.desc: WKRP 216

programme.title: WKRP 220
programme.desc: WKRP 220

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Whilst Evan is babysitting baby Emily he accidentally loses her

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood Ava Taylor his girlfriend Amy Harlon Marlene Hermon and Fida take a road trip in an RV

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: While the sheriffs office investigates a murder connected to a divorce ranch an old flame pays a visit to Ralph and Mia tells her dad about her relationship with Jack Meanwhile Vincent discovers that his wife is the rat

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Freeways got a new girlfriend and when her master is killed Freeway disappears with the gun -- but doesnt have it when he gets home

programme.title: Newhart - 708
programme.desc: Newhart - 708

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Augur is forced to take part in a Taelon experiment Daan and Liam try to convince Zoor that altering minds and implanting humans to make them aggressive to fight the Jaridians is not the correct path Maiya makes contact with Sandoval

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: In the midst of the post apocalyptic future the team decide to throw a birthday party for Debi Meanwhile the Morthren attempt to locate their malfunctioning seeing-eye device a self-controlled drone which has run amok through the city

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills father an adventurer by trade arrives in town to search for a rare flower

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane injects a dead man with a life-restoring serum that gives him the touch of death

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Several crew members explore the planet Sunin including botanist Shermeen Williams who appears to have visionary gifts She links up with an alien called Vindrus who wants her help in transferring his body and that of his race into solid matter giving them proper human form so that they can join the universe as real matter However for every one of his race made flesh an Alphan must lose their matter

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 219
programme.desc: Hercules 219

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Jaridian probe lands on Earth and begins sucking energy from the Comonality The Taelons use humans in a near-death state to keep their connection while Lili and Sandoval try to find out what is draining the energy

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After being shot by robbers who were holding up a store a young police officer is treated by a doctor who was on the scene Unfortunately the officer later dies and the doctor becomes the only one who can identify the robbers But when Stone and Keller try to call him they find that he had to be using a phony name The man has been practicing using the name of several different doctors

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Belzig head of a bank in East Berlin tricks unwary people anxious to escape to the West that he can help them Instead he steals their money and kills them Hes amassing a fortune to launch a new Nazi movement The mission for the IM force is to put him out of business

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Frank Barker wants Joe to help him get a firearms license for the Fielder Militia The LAPD knows that the militias weapons are stolen from the Army so they have Joe string Barker along until they can arrest him and grab the weapons

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: As a posse of sheriff deputies pursue Dr Kimble on foot in the desert he is rescued by outlaw bikers who want to use him to settle a score with local law enforcement

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A political candidate for Governor bases much of his campaign on libelling the Barkley family

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: The ArgonautsCheyenne meets two prospectors whose partner was killed by Indians The partner is the only one who knows where they found gold Given a description Cheyenne is able to lead them to the gold but one of the mens greed overtakes him

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Captain Newman MD
programme.desc: In 1944 an Army doctor is in charge of a neuropsychiatric ward at an Army Air Corps hospital in Arizona and he must deal with a variety of tough cases

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger
